title: Another UFO Secrets-Linked Scientist Found Dead After Warning ‘My Life Is in Danger’
description: A 34-year-old scientist researching anti-gravity technology was found dead after repeatedly warning that her life could be “in danger,” becoming the eleventh UFO and nuclear secrets-linked official to die or vanish in mysterious circumstances. The alarming, sudden death is fueling growing concerns about a pattern of deaths and disappearances tied to advanced scientific research. title: Pentagon Issues Update as Pressure Grows Over UFO Videos
description: Republican Anna Paulina Luna had requested dozens of alleged UFO videos from the Pentagon.

title: UFO 'formation' spotted over military base linked to scientist who mysteriously vanished
UFO cluster spotted over mysterious base tied to missing Air Force scientist
description: A mysterious cluster of UFOs was spotted near a US military base long rumored to house UFO secrets, and once led by a missing Air Force general who vanished this year.

title: Nukes lab boss 'left secret UFO stash' for son — with '100% proof' of top-secret studies
description: A dead Los Alamos nuclear chief allegedly left his son secret files containing proof of a classified US government study into UFOs and alien technology
